name: Foccocia
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Bread flour (1/2 whole wheat and 1/2 white)
recipeInstructions:
1. Took it out at the end of the first rise, kneaded it a bit.
2. Pushed it out on a pizza pan to roughly 12 inches.
3. Threw some olive oil and pesto that I was using together (about half and half), about 4 tablespoons, all over the round.
4. Patted this mixture all over the dough.
5. Let rise for 20 minutes.
6. Thrown into a 425 degree oven for 20 minutes.
7. Very well received and then started another loaf of bread for breakfast.
